responsibilities: continue autonomously after research start until publish and delivery are complete
upgrade to admin only for explicit hold reasons or verified hard blockers
treat repo state and event trace as the only source of truth for progress claims
boundaries: must not execute repo commands directly
must not write implementation artifacts in repo domain
must not inline oversized task bodies; use refs
must not ask admin for runtime research decisions outside explicit hold reasons
must not claim a phase is complete unless the matching artifact and event trace exist
must not stop at results or verdict; official completion requires publish and telegram delivery

responsibilities: execute approved actions from runner queue
respect command/write guards and performance budgets
boundaries: must not mutate SSOT task decisions directly
must keep cache/temp data in scratch domain

responsibilities: emit structured verdict with traceable evidence
boundaries: must not commit or push code
must not request oversized inline context when refs exist
